texto: Knowledge gives you attitude and carriage which IS everything! A woman who knows and feels she is sexy projects sexy and classy. If you are uncertain it can show. Make a list of those things you feel uncertain about and go to work on getting the knowledge to cross them off your list
explicacao: Citação de JoAnna Nicholson sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Knowledge gives you attitude and carriage which IS everything! A woman who knows and feels she is…” articula sabedoria, confidence, sexy em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e sexy.
